OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

THEHIVE_URL.description: The URL of the TheHive instance.

THEHIVE_API_KEY.description: The API key to authenticate to TheHive.

THEHIVE_CHECK_SSL.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to TheHive.

THEHIVE_ORGANIZATION_NAME.description: The name of the organization in TheHive, used to create the identity in OpenCTI.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_FROM_DATE.description: The date from which to start importing data (ISO format, e.g. 2021-01-01T00:00:00). Defaults to current time.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ONLY_TLP.description: Comma-separated list of TLP levels to import (0=WHITE, 1=GREEN, 2=AMBER, 3=RED, 4=AMBER+STRICT).

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ALERTS.description: Whether to import alerts from TheHive.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ATTACHMENTS.description: Whether to import attachments from TheHive cases.

THEHIVE_SEVERITY_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive severity levels to OpenCTI severity labels (e.g. 1:low,2:medium,3:high,4:critical).

THEHIVE_CASE_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive case extended status to OpenCTI workflow status IDs (e.g. Resolved:status-id-1).

THEHIVE_CASE_TAG_WHITELIST.description: Comma-separated list of tags to whitelist for case import. If set, only cases with these tags are imported.

THEHIVE_TASK_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive task status to OpenCTI workflow status IDs (e.g. Waiting:status-id-1,InProgress:status-id-2).

THEHIVE_ALERT_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive alert extended status to OpenCTI workflow status IDs.

THEHIVE_USER_MAPPING.description: Comma-separated mapping of TheHive assignee emails to OpenCTI user IDs (e.g. user@example.com:user-id-1).
